nasb.text: Therefore it is necessary to be in subjection, not only because of wrath, but also for conscience’ sake.

esv.text: Therefore one must be in subjection, not only to avoid God’s wrath but also for the sake of conscience.

cnv.text: 所以你們必須服從，不但是因為刑罰，也是因為良心的緣故。

ccb.text: 所以，你们必须服从，不单是为了避免受到惩罚，也是为了良心无愧。

csbs.text: 因此，你们必须服从，不仅是为了震怒的缘故，也是为了良心。
